message:
fix: add auto-respawn hook to mayor session for tmux detach survival

Mayor session now uses SetAutoRespawnHook (same as deacon) so that
when the tmux client detaches or Claude exits, the pane automatically
respawns after a 3-second debounce. This allows the user to detach
and reattach from any terminal without losing the mayor session.

Fixes: gt-ay6nm4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
